title: Warneckea congolensis

intro: Warneckea congolensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in African medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections.
